news.title: ASX jumps on peace deal; Gold miners and Sigma rally, oil stocks fall
news.snippet: The Australian sharemarket jumped in early trade after Donald Trump announced a peace deal that includes an immediate ceasefire “on all fronts” of the war in the Middle East.

news.title: ‘Step down’: Owner of Platypus, Athlete’s Foot cops hostile bid from UK shareholder
news.snippet: Fed up with embattled footwear retailer Accent Group’s performance, its biggest investor – UK retail giant Frasers – has taken matters into its own hands.

news.title: Dalaroo hits high-grade gold in soils along 7km in West Africa
news.snippet: Dalaroo Metals has defined a 7km gold corridor at its Bondoukou project in West Africa, with soil assays peaking at a remarkable 23.26g/t gold.

news.title: Labor sends emergency delegation to defuse Asian gas alarm
news.snippet: Senior officials will travel to Asia this week in an attempt to douse a growing diplomatic crisis in countries unsettled by Australia’s plans for a gas reservation.

news.title: Trump’s deal will show how pointless his war was
news.snippet: Oil might soon flow through the Strait of Hormuz, but the damage done by the US president’s war will linger for a very long time.

news.title: Great Southern fires up 20,000m WA gold hunt
news.snippet: Great Southern Mining is launching a major 20,000m drill campaign at its WA gold projects, targeting the Golden Boulder, Amy Clarke and Mon Ami discoveries.

news.title: SpaceX’s $3 trillion debut expected to kick off wave of AI mega IPOs
news.snippet: The spectacular debut of SpaceX paves the way for an unprecedented series of floats this year as AI giants such as Anthropic and OpenAI plan to go public.

news.title: Why Cameron Munster is always Queensland's Origin saviour
Quick hits: Curaçao's special goal and De Oranje brighten up day four
Eclipse reveals broader Greenland critical minerals bounty
news.snippet: Eclipse Metals has confirmed high-grade fluorite at its historic Ivigtût cryolite mine in Greenland. It also identified gallium and other critical minerals, broadening potential.

news.title: Live: White House UFC event ends with massive upset win in title fight
De Minaur falls short in Dutch ATP final as Wimbledon preparation continues
